property.label: Object Name
property.name: childObjectApiName
property.description: The related object you want to query

property.label: Fields Name
property.name: fieldList
property.description: The list of fields (coma separated) you want to query

property.label: Parent Object
property.name: lookupFieldApiName
property.description: The parent object you api name (example: AccountId)

property.label: Total Records
property.name: limitSize
property.description: The total number of records you want to display
